programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike and Nellies Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateurs two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Brazilian football legend Ronaldo visits the town to advise Homer on refereeing Little League matches, while Marge reacts to accusations of technophobia by purchasing a PC - and soon becomes hooked on a game involving a virtual Springfield being terrorised by Bart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart receives a lot of negative attention from Springfield residents when he costs the Isotots baseball team the Little League championship. Lisa tries to cheer him up by introducing him to Bill Buckner, but her plan goes awry. Meanwhile, Homer becomes a mattress salesman, but finds his new role causes issues with Marge

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay discovers Gloria has planned a romantic getaway to Hawaii for his birthday, but his excitement fades when he realises the rest of the clan will be joining them. Starring Ed ONeill and Sofia Vergara

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil tries to be romantic when the family goes on holiday to Hawaii, and Jay realises it will not be as relaxing as he had hoped. Elsewhere, Mitch and Cam cannot decide whether to go sightseeing, and the children run riot. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell and Ed ONeill

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Intimacy Week reaches boiling point as one couples relationship threatens to implode, while a bride makes a decision that breaks her grooms heart

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: The coach is parked up in Portimao in Portugal. A morning of fun at a water park ends dramatically for one tourist, so a more serene afternoon of lawn bowls follows

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob bosss place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word Hope written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isnt quite so convinced

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A teenage Homer embarks on a road trip in the company of Grampa to look for his mother

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The dinner party descends into chaos when a shock return re-ignites old feuds and exposes fresh cracks in multiple marriages

programme.title: MAFS Australia: After the Dinner Party
programme.desc: Companion show hosted by Jules Lund, Brittany Hockney and Laura Byrne. Each week, a selection of the current series participants share behind-the-scenes gossip, betrayals and shocking revelations from the experiment. In the first episode, Alissa, Stella, Chris and Danny unpack unexpected pregnancy announcements

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Banged Up: Stars Behind Bars, Planet Earth, Culprits, The Curse of Robert the Doll and Little Trains and Big Names with Pete Waterman. From November 2023

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: After being stood up the previous week, Geordie model Georgia ended up flirting with nice guy Alex. Now they are back to pick up where they left off. Baker Chloe prides herself on being a good judge of character, which is just as well because her date, amateur dramatics enthusiast Ben, has played many different roles in his time. Swinging sixties fan Robert is hoping fifties fashionista Amy will accompany him to a Northern Soul night after their meal - although he might have second thoughts when he sees whats tattooed on her toe. Plus, the subject of family life proves to be high on the agenda for make-up artist Verona and fire-fighter Paul, as well as father-of-one Patrick and German-born Thomas

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 22-year-old gym addict Sophie from Surrey, who is desperate to find a man who boasts a little banter. Next up is Dom, a 25-year-old wedding model from Bournemouth. He wants to find the perfect man to waltz him down the aisle and thinks people that can guarantee to do this are confident, daring and adventurous in their outlook

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The dinner party descends into chaos when a shock return re-ignites old feuds and exposes fresh cracks in multiple marriages

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Thanksgiving arrives at the Goldberg family home, Pop-Pop and Uncle Marvin each find a way to disrupt Beverlys carefully made plans

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When a publisher shows interest in her recipes, Beverly prepares to finally realise her dream of writing a cookbook. Meanwhile, Geoff finds himself caught between Erica and Barry

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Revisiting the 2018 wedding of Hayley who handed over control to groom Ben in 2018. However, her traditional Jewish do wound up involving a hot tub

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil, Claire, Alex and Luke love having the twins around, but find taking care of them is exhausting. However, when they realise the babies might help them with a few things on their to-do lists, they offer to give Haley the day off

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam help Lily overcome her insecurities about wearing a bathing suit to a pool party, but discover they have some of their own. Meanwhile, now that Glorias new internship is taking up so much of her time, Jay is feeling particularly neglected

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam turns to the cool new guidance counsellor for advice. Meanwhile, Erica and Geoff try to hide the fact that they are living together

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire feels slightly inadequate when her old friend, Valerie visits and is nothing like Claire remembered. Jay has an unsettling locker room moment when he and Cameron play racquetball, and Mitchell tries to help Gloria with some legal problems. Guest starring Minnie Driver

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The families prepare to woo their significant others on Valentines Day. Claire plans a special, romantic getaway with Phil, and Jay decides to treat Gloria to a stand-up show. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitchell play Cupid for Manny to end his quest for a date

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: On a mission to play hardcore pranks, Bart, Nelson and Milhouse order Moe a mail-order bride from the Dark Web

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart feels neglected when Homer and Lisa bond over To Kill a Mockingbird and start spending quality time together, so Marge tries to help her husband divide his attentions equally

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer leave Grampa to babysit the kids, but little green army men trigger a PTSD episode, sending the family on a journey to Abes past when he was a postwar toy model

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Twenty seven-year-old single mother and dog groomer Brenna seeks a man who wont be put off by the fact she has a daughter. She hopes to find a connection with dog-loving electrician Ross. Twenty-four-year-old party girl Tori is looking for someone to bring a bit of sparkle into her life. Shes matched with 30-year-old beautician Sophie, whos on the lookout for a life partner. Plus, actress Alice meets 26-year-old cocktail bartender Jac, who is hoping to shake his life up a bit

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay travels to the El Greco restaurant in Austin, Texas, where the owners have resorted to using a microwave to prepare their authentic Greek dishes. Gordon faces the difficult task of uniting a squabbling family before tackling the bigger problem of a business on the brink of collapse

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer, Moe, Apu and Principal Skinner become stand-in firefighters, and initially prove surprisingly efficient. Unfortunately, they soon decide the job does not pay well enough, and seek other forms of compensation for their heroic acts - by stealing from houses during emergency calls

programme.sub-title: Stop or My Dog Will Shoot!
programme.desc: Santas Little Helper is enrolled in the Animal Police Academy and soon graduates, but realises he is not cut out for life as a law-enforcer and rebels by biting Bart - much to the dismay of Marge, who has already bought a python to replace him

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claires plans for a family portrait do not go smoothly, and Cameron reveals his inner diva. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Eric Stonestreet

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old car, Mitchell decides to build a large princess castle for Lily, and Manny invites a girl over for a study date - which makes Gloria uncomfortable. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households - a man who struggles to keep up with his younger wife, an embarrassing husband and a gay couple getting used to parenthood after adopting a Vietnamese baby. Starring Julie Bowen and Ty Burrell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: On a mission to play hardcore pranks, Bart, Nelson and Milhouse order Moe a mail-order bride from the Dark Web

programme.title: Celebrity Coach Trip
programme.desc: It is the final day of an action-packed trip around Portugal, and in Albufeira, one celebrity couple will be crowned the winners

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer shakes off the shackles of his traditional lifestyle after hitting it off with his trendy new neighbours, who are the ultimate in cool - although Marge isnt too keen on the hipster clan, especially their parenting style. However, when Bart falls out with one of his new friends kids, the doughnut-loving dad soon sees them for what they really are. With the guest voices of Portlandia stars Fred Armisen and Carrie Brownstein, and Patton Oswalt (Young Adult)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer doesnt seem to care when Santas Little Helper goes missing, puzzling the rest of his family who are all panicking about their missing pooch. So Grampa shares a story about his son, a certain childhood pet and a more youthful but no-less-bitter Mr Burns

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge select Fat Tony to be Maggies godfather, but are worried about his influence on her

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Dad Who Knew Too Little
programme.desc: Homer realises he knows very little about Lisa and tries to fill the gaps in his knowledge by hiring a dodgy private detective to spy on her - only to end up on the wrong side of the law. With the guest voice of Elliott Gould

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The first dater through the doors is no-nonsense Mercedes who worries her date, gamer Greg, wont be able to handle her secret. Fifty-three-year-old jetsetter Georgina has endured many a heartbreak, but still craves fun and excitement, hopefully part-time DJ Steve is the man to provide a romantic soundtrack to her life. Having endured a very public on-screen divorce, Lauren from reality series The Real Housewives of Cheshire, now seeks something a bit more real. Trainee teacher Ashley has been doing his homework when it comes to love and has a long list of requirements for a potential suitor

programme.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum (2019)
programme.desc: The seemingly invincible hero returns, this time with a $14million bounty on his head which rises each hour, and every underworld figure around the world desperate to cash in. However, John Wick does receive support from Sofia, a fellow dog lover, assassin and manager of Casablancas Continental Hotel. Director Chad Stahelskis action thriller sequel, starring Keanu Reeves, Halle Berry and Ian McShane

programme.title: The Inbetweeners Movie (2011)
programme.desc: Awkward teenagers Simon, Will, Jay and Neil plan a holiday to the Greek island of Crete after they finish their exams, hoping to experience drink, sex and debauchery beyond their wildest dreams. However, things do not quite work out as planned. Comedy based on the TV series, with Joe Thomas, Simon Bird, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty six-year-old psychology student Alesia is tired of meeting boys and is now seeking someone more emotionally mature than her previous partners. Next up is Louise from London, who has travelled the world and been on over 200 dates, but is still no closer to finding her soul mate. Anna Richardson assists both singletons, inviting them to choose their favourite partner from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time until fully nude. The contenders then don their glad rags to enjoy a date together

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including The Crown, Survivor, 007: Road to a Million, The Good Ship Murder, Shoplifters: Caught Red Handed and ITV News coverage of the Cabinet reshuffle. From November 2023

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Beverly signs everyone up for a holiday family photo, Geoffrey is excited to join in, despite Ericas reservations. Barry must face the fact that he has not been a good friend

After attempting to build bridges with Beks in Scotland, Freddy soon finds himself back in her bad books

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go North
programme.desc: The tour of Yorkshire continues in Leeds, as Simon King and Dave Myers visit the stunning Kirkgate market before riding to Skipton. There they meet Sam and his family who are making skyr, traditionally an Icelandic dairy product. Si and Dave later meet Monalisa, who makes authentic Indian ready meals. The bikers use her home kit to cook some tasty prawn pakoras and naan bread

programme.desc: Ree sends her daughters homemade breakfast tarts, nut and seed brittle, salt and pepper crackers and cherry gummies in care packages while they are away at college

programme.sub-title: Beef, Crispy Squid and Polenta Cake
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates stress-free recipes for tasty dishes that each contain only five ingredients, including high-speed ginger shakin beef and pak choi. Plus, crispy squid and smashed avocado, pork and mash gratin, and almond, orange and polenta cake

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a pork burger as he attempts to take fast food to the next level, along with easy rustic gnocchi for an elegant vegetarian supper, sticky mango prawn and frozen banoffee cheesecake

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten showcases a range of cheeses and the best ways to prepare them

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina and Jeffrey start the day with a fabulous breakfast, before heading off to Brooklyn for a culinary tour armed with a packed lunch, including a visit to a pizza place

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: After last weeks baked Alaska scandal - which led to Iain hanging up his apron and has since also seen Diana leave the show - judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the remaining contestants pastry skills. They begin with a signature challenge of a sweet custard tart of their own invention, ranging from rhubarb and custard to tropical Manchester tart. The technical round involves recreating Pauls recipe for mini pear pies, followed by their showpiece bake - a towering collection of three-tiered pies in just four hours. Along the way, Mel Giedroyc investigates the history of an ancient wedding centrepiece known as Bride Pie

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining six bakers have passed the halfway point of the contest, and now face three European bakes - beginning with yeast-leavened cakes, a tricky cross between cake and bread. Mary Berry then sets them the challenge of rustling up a Swedish princess torte, but they have their work cut out completing all 24 stages of the recipe in little more than two hours. They finish by creating their own version of the dobos torte, a multi-layered cake from Hungary. However, they must go one step further and bake a two-tiered version with an emphasis on caramel. Which of the bakers will come to a sticky end?

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef visits the home of Claude Monet in Giverny, where he prepares a dish of crab and dulse, and samples pike as served by local chef Eric Guerin

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates more stress-free recipes, preparing sausage carbonara with a peppery punch, a spicy one-pot Thai red chicken soup, a scrambled egg omelette, and steamed pudding with a speedy, sticky marmalade glaze

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: The chef prepares a roasted shrimp with feta in exchange for an ice cream master-class from friend and creamery owner Rori Trovato

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: American chef and cookbook writer Ina Garten prepares tomato crostini and whipped feta. Plus, she makes thyme roasted marcona almonds as a cocktail snack

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Presenters Mel Giedroyc and Sue Perkins set the remaining contestants three tasks involving pastry, beginning by asking them to make signature savoury parcels. For the technical challenge, they must prepare a cake that hails from the Brittany region of France - the kouign amann, which none of the bakers has ever heard of - before creating two different types of eclair in the showstopper round. Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood judge the hopefuls efforts before deciding who is star baker and who is going home

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The nations favourite baking contest has certainly proved it can hold its own after moving to BBC One - this series has been the most entertaining (not to mention contentious) yet. Its about to get a whole lot hotter in the kitchen, though, as it reaches the quarter-final stage, and just five amateur bakers remain. Theyve all impressed to various extents during Bread Week - at least sufficiently to make it through - but now their skills are thoroughly tested as they take on enriched doughs. They have a signature bake in which they must work with soft dough to create artful works, a technical that sees them recreate an Eastern European cross between bread and pastry, and a showstopper involving doughnuts

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef arrives at the Palace of Versailles, a vast royal hunting lodge which boasts amazing architecture and a great market. He talks about food fashions and seasonality with the director of the Kings allotment, meets a chocolatier who makes enormous chocolate sculptures, which he then casts in bronze or aluminium, and visits Alain Ducasses newly opened Restaurant Ore. Dishes include sole Veronique, roasted spelt and wild mushrooms, and veal chops

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef ends his excursion at the Bois de Boulogne, a park on the outskirts of Paris, coinciding with the hosting of a prestigious steeplechase event at its Auteuil Hippodrome. James meets fellow Yorkshireman and jockey James Revelly and rustles up leeks vinaigrette with salmon and lamb cutlets with a colourful ratatouille. Later, the chef pays a visit to the Michelin-starred Pre Catelan restaurant, where he enjoys his favourite meal of the trip

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go North
programme.desc: Simon King and Dave Myers start their tour of Northumberland by visiting the seaside town of Amble, before tasting some of the best seafood fresh from the North Sea. The bikers then visit Turvelaws Farm, nestled at the foot of the Cheviot Hills, where they grow nine different varieties of potato

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree prepares some of Ladds favourite foods, including spatchcock BBQ chicken, thin and crispy waffle fries and for dessert spoon cake with gooey chocolate frosting

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree fills her freezer with Tex-Mex favourites, including green chili pork stew, mac and cheese, and a veggie taco salad

programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates more stress-free recipes for dishes that each contain only five ingredients, featuring a tasty tikka chicken roast, a vibrant carrot and grain salad, a super-speedy crab spaghetti, and chocolate orange shortbread

programme.title: Paul Hollywood: City Bakes
programme.desc: Paul looks back over his incredible journey into the baking of the worlds cities, and showcases some of the most inspirational characters that he met on his travels

programme.title: Paul Hollywood: City Bakes
programme.desc: Paul looks back over his incredible journey into the baking of the worlds cities, and showcases some of his favourite moments spent with the bakers themselves

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go North
programme.desc: The tour of Yorkshire continues in Leeds, as Simon King and Dave Myers visit the stunning Kirkgate market before riding to Skipton. There they meet Sam and his family who are making skyr, traditionally an Icelandic dairy product. Si and Dave later meet Monalisa, who makes authentic Indian ready meals. The bikers use her home kit to cook some tasty prawn pakoras and naan bread

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond creates show-stopping pies. She shares recipes for a waffle cone ice cream pie and a decadent double chocolate pie

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree sends her daughters homemade breakfast tarts, nut and seed brittle, salt and pepper crackers and cherry gummies in care packages while they are away at college

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.sub-title: Beef, Crispy Squid and Polenta Cake
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates stress-free recipes for tasty dishes that each contain only five ingredients, including high-speed ginger shakin beef and pak choi. Plus, crispy squid and smashed avocado, pork and mash gratin, and almond, orange and polenta cake

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes a pork burger as he attempts to take fast food to the next level, along with easy rustic gnocchi for an elegant vegetarian supper, sticky mango prawn and frozen banoffee cheesecake

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina Garten showcases a range of cheeses and the best ways to prepare them

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa - Back to Basics
programme.desc: Ina and Jeffrey start the day with a fabulous breakfast, before heading off to Brooklyn for a culinary tour armed with a packed lunch, including a visit to a pizza place

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: After last weeks baked Alaska scandal - which led to Iain hanging up his apron and has since also seen Diana leave the show - judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood assess the remaining contestants pastry skills. They begin with a signature challenge of a sweet custard tart of their own invention, ranging from rhubarb and custard to tropical Manchester tart. The technical round involves recreating Pauls recipe for mini pear pies, followed by their showpiece bake - a towering collection of three-tiered pies in just four hours. Along the way, Mel Giedroyc investigates the history of an ancient wedding centrepiece known as Bride Pie

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The remaining six bakers have passed the halfway point of the contest, and now face three European bakes - beginning with yeast-leavened cakes, a tricky cross between cake and bread. Mary Berry then sets them the challenge of rustling up a Swedish princess torte, but they have their work cut out completing all 24 stages of the recipe in little more than two hours. They finish by creating their own version of the dobos torte, a multi-layered cake from Hungary. However, they must go one step further and bake a two-tiered version with an emphasis on caramel. Which of the bakers will come to a sticky end?

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef visits the home of Claude Monet in Giverny, where he prepares a dish of crab and dulse, and samples pike as served by local chef Eric Guerin

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: This time, the chef visits the capital city, Paris, exploring one of the largest wholesale food markets in Europe, before setting up a cooking station in one of the warehouses to cook a dish using chicken and mushrooms. James also visits the kitchen of the world-renowned chef, Pierre Gagnaire

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go North

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Kenny Atkinson in Northumberland, where the pair learn how mead is made on Holy Island. James cooks up a Singapore-inspired crab and lobster dish on a stunning beach, before he and Kenny enjoy a cruise around Coquet Island, which is an RSPB reserve

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Michelin-starred chef Lisa Goodwin-Allen on a visit to the Isle of Man during the warm-up week for the famous TT race. James serves up proper biker food - pork burgers with a spicy apple sauce - and picks up some local Manx kippers to make soup. Lisa visits local organic juice producers before James joins TT legend John McGuinness as he and his team prepare for the race, treating the bikers to lamb chops with hispi cabbage and an olive glaze

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels up and down Americas west coast searching for cool neighbourhood spots. He arrives in San Diego where a restaurant serves up a creme brulee French toast.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs Oleson invites herself along on the Ingalls family camp out after concluding that Laura and Mary will have the upper hand collecting leaves for a science project. However, the Ingalls and Olesons seem to mix like water and oil throughout the trip

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: At the End of the Rainbow
programme.desc: Laura and her friend Jonah find pyrite while fishing in a stream, and mistake it for gold. Laura spends her days amassing the gold dust, and begins fantasising about her family being wealthy and the Olesons being poor. However the secrecy leads to squabbling

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy needs some peace and quiet to finish writing his book. Ben quits his job at the newspaper and becomes a car salesman, but picks up some dishonest habits

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy has heard nothing from the publisher whom he sent his book, so goes to New York to find out if it is going to be printed

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.sub-title: Two Flew Over the Cuckoos Nest
programme.desc: As Niamh battles with her feelings for Sean, her husband Ambrose sets out to rescue a couple in trouble on the coast - but his bravery puts his own life at risk when he takes a fall down the cliff. Drama, starring Peter Hanly

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: The villagers of Ormston close ranks as civil servant Mr Ffotherington arrives to assess their objections to the new road, but when he insinuates that he could influence the decision, the residents fall over themselves to keep him sweet. However, Mr Boynton and Rev Brewer begin to suspect there is more to the official than meets the eye. Elsewhere, Dr Newman faces a heart-wrenching ethical dilemma when he diagnoses a woman with motor neurone disease and Jean gets a nasty shock when she checks on her wedding dress fund

programme.title: Bramwell
programme.desc: Eleanor is flattered by the attentions of charming Dr Hunter _ but when his housekeeper dies suddenly, she changes her opinion. Period drama, starring Jemma Redgrave

programme.desc: A hawk is attacking the Waltons chickens, so Grandpa and Jim-Bob set out to catch it. Meanwhile, a new minister joins the community

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: The family find a runaway boy hiding in the barn, and learns he has walked all the way from North Carolina. Guest starring Todd Bridges

programme.title: Ballykissangel
programme.desc: The town falls silent as the locals mourn Ambrose. Orla bumps into a special someone, and Eamon Byrne plans his organic pig farm. Drama, starring Tony Doyle, Niall Toibin and Victoria Smurfit

programme.title: Born and Bred
programme.desc: The residents of Ormston unite in their resolve to win the 21st annual pub Olympics, as the hefty cash prize on offer would go a long way to buying back Phylliss inn from the brewery. As the casualties begin to mount, it all comes down to the final event - the tug of war. Elsewhere, Tom is furious when Donald delivers a parcel from Arthur, while Eddie and Jean come to the conclusion that village life is not for them

programme.title: Bramwell
programme.desc: Eleanor and Nurse Carr carry out tuberculosis tests in the East End slums, while Roberts electro-therapy treatment causes problems. Period drama, starring Jemma Redgrave

programme.title: Rumpole of the Bailey
programme.sub-title: Rumpole and the Age for Retirement
programme.desc: The barrister defends an old villain who is being set up for a major art theft and finds that both he and his client are under pressure from their respective families to retire. Courtroom drama, with Leo McKern

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Nurse Baker falls foul of Major Houlihan and is confined to quarters, but when her husband arrives in camp, Hawkeye and BJ arrange a battlefield second honeymoon by quarantining them in Hot Lips tent. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda and Loretta Swit

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Everyone is dejected when Hot Lips disappears from the camp. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda and Loretta Swit

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A depressed major begins a letter to Freud as part of his therapy, but discovers laughter is the best medicine when BJ suggests a practical joke on Frank. Korean War comedy, starring Mike Farrell and Larry Linville

programme.title: Last Knights (2015)
programme.desc: A warrior is left a broken man when the nobleman he serves is put to death for refusing to pay tribute to a corrupt warlord. He seeks to redeem himself by reuniting his dead masters other soldiers and leading them into battle to avenge his death. Medieval action adventure, starring Clive Owen and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Among those arriving at Kings College Hospital is 56-year-old Malcolm, who is put on life support after a cardiac arrest. Nightclub host Phil, 36, receives treatment for chronic pain in his back and side, and realises his party lifestyle is taking its toll, while medics discover 61-year-old Bob has suffered a stroke. Doctors also see to Kamilla, 12, who has been knocked down by a car on a pedestrian crossing

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: On the night shift, paramedics are called to a man complaining of a fast heart rate and chest pains. In the back of the ambulance, he claims to have taken amphetamines for several days. When a man is found slumped over a table outside a shop, the owners ring 999. The patient is intoxicated, and the all-female crew must be wary of his tight grip as they treat him in the back of the ambulance

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors run tests on 89-year-old Alyce, who has been brought to Kings by ambulance after falling near her home. Shes accompanied by her close friend Linda, and reveals her resolve to make sure she lives long enough to celebrate her next birthday. Soon after, 23-year-old groom-to-be Sean is examined following an epileptic seizure lasting most of the night

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Among those arriving at Kings College Hospital is 56-year-old Malcolm, who is put on life support after a cardiac arrest. Nightclub host Phil, 36, receives treatment for chronic pain in his back and side, and realises his party lifestyle is taking its toll, while medics discover 61-year-old Bob has suffered a stroke. Doctors also see to Kamilla, 12, who has been knocked down by a car on a pedestrian crossing

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Tara takes the gang clubbing in one of Barcelonas top nightclubs. Her 24 hours in charge pushes some of the group out of their comfort zone, but will her idea of holiday heaven be someones holiday hell?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Mark Crib welcomes the group to the Urban Beach in Bournemouth, Dorset, for the weeks final BandB visit. The boutique establishment features chic rooms with deluxe bathrooms, and the guests approve of the afternoons activity - a speedboat ride along the Jurassic coast

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien continue their mission to repurpose old cast-offs into cash, making an extraordinary find from a Dutch designer in accountant Debbies lean-to

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Laura and Nick dream of making a permanent move to Spain with their beloved dog Poppy. Theyre after a property in Estepona on Spains Costa del Sol that meets both their needs and Poppys. Property expert Jean Johansson lines up five options for their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Windsor, Berkshire, the first to host is estate agent Vikki whos hoping to bag the £1000 prize by hosting a ladies day-themed dinner party. The guests shes hoping to impress are entrepreneur and self-proclaimed winner Mohinder, local radio DJ Mary, 66-year-old football-loving Angie and second-hand car dealer Robert. With some gamey golfers, difficult diners and cutting commentary, it promises to be a night her guests wont forget in a hurry

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night in Windsor, and radio DJ Mary hosts an evening featuring traditional Irish dishes like vegetable soup, steak with champ, and an Eton Mess with a twist

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week in Windsor is outspoken entrepreneur Mohinder, who hopes to impress his fellow guests with an ambitious menu featuring tulips and a cauliflower foam

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Windsor is hosted by retired sales manager Angie, who is planning some 1960s fun. However, her guests are not impressed by the rules she lays down at the beginning

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night of the competition in Windsor, Berkshire, car salesman Rob unleashes the mother of all surprises on his guests, welcoming them to his enormous country mansion complete with swimming pool and Ferrari. Estate agent Vicky and radio DJ Mary are smitten by Rob and his house, but for entrepreneur Mohinder its all too much as hes completely upstaged and realises he is no longer leader of the pack

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at Gracelands Glamping, in Ballyronan, County Londonderry, where couple Shaun Coleman and Hollie Pattison host. In the evening, Derry and Mikes broken TV leaves the pair pining for some entertainment. At breakfast, the DIY instant barbecue gets a grilling by some of the guests, and the hosts find some of their scores hard to digest

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former international rugby union player Brian Robinson welcomes guests to Manse on the Beach in Cloughey, Co Down, where sea views and an onsite sauna prove a hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to The Secret Garden Glamping in Skelmersdale, Lancashire, but guests feel hemmed in by their hideaway and yearn for a communal connection

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Walkeringham in Nottinghamshire, and Hawthorn Hideaway, owned by partners Ronnie and Jo Lee. Theyre hoping that their relaxing, adults-only accommodation will be loved by all. Guests Derry and Mike are delighted by the decor, and Shaun and Hollie are stunned by a surprise, but things dont quite add up for Brian. In the morning, the cook-your-own breakfast is a hit with most, but for Derry and Mike, the facilities failing leads to frustration

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the final day, the BandB owners gather to settle some scores. Gracelands Glamping is up first and Shaun and Hollie want to get to the bottom of their disappointing breakfast scores. Meanwhile, Brian wants to pull back the covers on Shaun and Hollies sleep score from Manse on the Beach. Eventually, the payments are revealed and a winner is announced

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head off to Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, to rescue a 1992 VW Corrado, a German coupe that, in its time, was one of the fastest small family cars on the road. The car belongs to 37-year-old Ashley, who even went as far as changing his surname to match his car. Sadly, when Ashley fell ill, his car ended up rotting away under a cover

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Rochdale to rescue an Opel Manta GTE. The car belongs to former amateur rally driver Alan, who loved his Manta so much he couldnt bear to part with it, even when it went off the road. With Alan becoming a bit of a recluse after developing health problems and losing his wife to cancer, his family and friends hope that the Car S.O.S treatment will be just the thing to bring Alan back out of his shell

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help house-hunters find their dream properties in the Peak District, guiding them through the complex world of viewings and agents. Kirstie is with single mother Anne, who sold her home in Sheffield to move to the countryside with her teenage son. However, a short-term stay with her parents has turned into eight months, so Kirstie has her work cut out to find Anne a suitable property fast. Phil is with Andrea and James, who are still searching for their ideal place after two years

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Lauren and Christian Grant in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, who are unsure whether to sell or upgrade their house. Christian dreams of a home bursting with character, but Lauren thinks that they can refurbish their four-bedroom detached property to make it more suitable for them and their two small children

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.sub-title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Murder of Rikki Neave - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part special exploring the largest ever unsolved murder case in the history of Cambridgeshire Police, the murder of a six-year-old child in 1994. Initial investigations pointed to the boys mother, who seemed to have an interest in murder and black magic. When a new team takes over, they uncover flaws in the original police work and a compelling new lead

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.sub-title: 24 Hours in Police Custody: The Murder of Rikki Neave - Part Two
programme.desc: Concluding the investigation into the 1994 murder of six-year-old Rikki Neave. Fifteen years after Rikkis mother was cleared of his murder following a flawed police investigation, a team of dedicated officers from the Major Crime Unit of Cambridgeshire police were authorised to begin a fresh investigation. Analysis of the evidence put a new suspect, James Watson, who was 13 at the time of the killing, together with Rikki on the day of his disappearance. But despite a forensic breakthrough, Watson presented the officers with a conundrum that made it difficult to prove the case against him

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to a man under arrest. Hes outside in the street and has hit his head, and the police want to make sure hes well enough to be taken to the station. A mum calls 999 when her six-year-old son has a seizure, and a nurse finds her patient in bed with a fever and having difficulty breathing. The paramedics suspect that he may have fractured a rib

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.sub-title: The Older You Get, the More Serious it Can Be
programme.desc: This compilation episode takes a look at some of the injuries that the UKs elderly population have suffered from, such as a man whos fallen while collecting his morning paper and has badly hit his head. Paramedics also treat a man who has collapsed at home with dangerously high blood sugar levels, as well as a woman whos fallen over while out shopping and may have broken her leg

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Tensions run high at Kings College Hospital when police suspect a patient is concealing a weapon, while maybe mother-of-four Hillary arrives in resus with a severe head injury after falling from her horse. Icylyns bloated abdomen baffles the medical team and she has to wait overnight for a diagnosis, and 14-year-old Chloe receives treatment following her involvement in a fight

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Sister Jen is on duty in resus looking after 48-year-old Bobby, who has been suffering from seizures at home. Bobby has spent most of his adult life in prison for a number of violent crimes including murder. Meanwhile, 70-year-old Ronald had to cut short his 46th wedding anniversary celebrations after experiencing breathing difficulties, and Rienelle, seven, receives treatment after falling from the top of a climbing frame at school

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: London-based teacher Angela takes the group out of the city to a vineyard to learn about the history and taste the local wine, but some members of the group take it too far. She blows the budget on a luxury boutique hotel in the hills but since the wine has been flowing all day long, the conversation is a little worse for wear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Brigitte Tee is upset to discover she has been given only one point for cleanliness and a heated exchange results in a walk-out, before the winner is announced

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are in Surrey, where they visit a collector of Kawasaki motorbikes

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gary and Jennifer from Northern Ireland are childhood sweethearts, who after 40 years together want to start a new chapter in their lives by buying a holiday home near the traditional Spanish town of Vera, on the Costa de Almería. For their £55,000 budget, theyd ideally love a property thats close to the beach, where they can enjoy long walks with their West Highland terrier. Ben Hillman shows them five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in and around Aberdeen, where 32-year-old offshore logistics supervisor Michelle, hopes to win over her guests with her Weegie wit and prove that Glaswegians have more fun. The guests shes out to impress are 46-year-old year farmer Turid, 30-year-old comedy promoter Naz, 28-year-old gas and oil purchasing specialist Sylvian and 21-year-old economics student David. After a tagine with a Glaswegian twist and the mother of all balloon games, what more can she possibly do to charm her guests?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Confident economics undergraduate David is next to host in Aberdeen, but will his student grub earn him 10 out of 10 with his guests? The 1920s Gatsby-themed dress code goes down a storm with almost everyone, on a night featuring food ending up on the floor, smoke alarms going off and some entertaining cocktail-making

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Oil and gas purchasing specialist Sylvian hosts the third dinner party in Aberdeen, hoping her attention to detail and an ambitious global themed menu will be enough to impress her guests. Philippines-born Sylvians dishes are an East-meets-West affair, starting with Japanese gyoza, followed by a Sumatran rendang and ending with a very British sticky toffee pudding. But dessert turns out to be sticky in more ways than one; cue tears before bedtime from the host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Aberdeen, its the turn of comedy promoter Naz to host. If Naz is to stand a chance of winning the competition, he must find a way to placate his guests, nearly all of whom he has managed to offend over the week. Naz is, by his own admission, not the greatest cook and things dont go according to plan and much of his food is burned and difficult to chew. Ever the eternal optimist however, Naz thinks that his humour and conviviality will win over his critics and earn him the grand

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the competition in Aberdeen finds journalist Turid hoping her home-grown produce will tantalise her guests taste buds. Can Turid knock Sylvian off the top spot and walk away with the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Abbey Court Guest House in Carlisle. After an afternoon of abseiling, the wastage at breakfast leaves some with a bad taste in their mouths

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals head to the Lime Tree Inn in the Yorkshire village of Great Ouseburn, run by chef Rob and his ex-model wife Heloisa. The guests expect big things from the glamorous couple but things get off to a tricky start when Pav questions the value for money and Kelly gives the bathroom a dusting off

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals are glamping at Holly Grove Farm in Staffordshire. Hosts Dave and Karon believe it is a rural idyll and their guests agree - apart from one, who is not happy with their size of their hut

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Lincolnshire is the last destination of the week, where Pav is on hosting duties at his Beldon House BandB. The grand exterior gets the guests feeling fancy, but dirty discoveries in the rooms leave some feeling bugged out. At least the BandBers all enjoy a good nights sleep - only to be ruined by instant coffee the following morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers, before discovering who has won the latest competition. Abbey Court Guest Houses Kelly wants to sink her teeth into her breakfast score, while The Lime Tree Inn operators have some qualms about Pavs facilities comments. Pavs under the microscope again for the poor sleep score he gave Holly Grove Farm, before he cleans up everyones cleanliness concerns

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Dorset to pick up a Ford Escort MK2 RS2000, which belongs to carpenter Mike. After his son was involved in a horrific road accident, Mike gave up work and supported him through a four-year recovery. Now, Mikes family want to give something back to offer thanks to such a devoted father by presenting him with his fully restored RS2000

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head off to Loughborough, Leicestershire, to take on a 1992 Saab 900 Turbo thats in desperate need of repair. The car belongs to Saab enthusiast and former electrical engineer Pravesh. Sadly, due to ill health, Pravesh has been left with little strength to work on the car, so its been left to rot. His family believe getting his Saab back on the road would give him the boost he needs

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps Jay and Charlene, parents to one-year-old Kai, who bought and refurbished their two bed home in Romford, Essex but now want to upsize to Chelmsford. Meanwhile, Phil Spencer assists Jemma and Graham, who returned from Los Angeles three years ago and want to settle in Southend-on-Sea

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Christine Attwood and Tony Congdon in Purley, Croydon, who need help deciding whether they should sell or upgrade their home. The pair have been going back and forth for almost a decade about the future of their unusual bungalow - Tony loves the property and its location, but Christine longs to move closer to the coast to enjoy her retirement

programme.title: Blanca
programme.desc: Blanca receives an anonymous call about a disturbance at the crumbling palazzo where Liguoris eccentric uncle lives. A body is found and connections to the local drug trade are exposed, but Uncle Edoardo blames the ghosts that have been haunting him. In Italian

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team treats 78-year-old Kevin, who suffered a cardiac arrest at the gym and fortunately received life-saving treatment at the scene from an instructor trained to use a portable defibrillator. Meanwhile, 23-year-old paramedic Declan is sent for an emergency CT scan, and Monica, 83, is experiencing numbness in her leg following a fall at home, and her initial X-ray appears to indicate she has a broken neck

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The documentary follows the work of the stroke team at south Londons Kings College Hospital. Lauras family faces a big decision when the 72-year-old grandmother is found to have a blood clot on her brain, while father-of-three Nic, the over-40s National BMX Champion, collapses in reception after suffering an accident while training for a stunt. The medics also treat 83-year-old Marjorie, who is complaining of a pain behind her eye following a recent bout of shingles

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The East Anglian Air Ambulance crew fight to save their patients partially amputated hand in Stowmarket and a crew in High Wycombe to help a man in cardiac arrest. The Essex and Herts Air Ambulance team deal with Beckys badly broken ankle in Chelmsford and in Hatfield, a motorcyclist suffers multiple injuries after a collision with a van

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The team treats 78-year-old Kevin, who suffered a cardiac arrest at the gym and fortunately received life-saving treatment at the scene from an instructor trained to use a portable defibrillator. Meanwhile, 23-year-old paramedic Declan is sent for an emergency CT scan, and Monica, 83, is experiencing numbness in her leg following a fall at home, and her initial X-ray appears to indicate she has a broken neck

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Social influencer Lubomba from Oxford treats his rivals to some high-octane jet skiing, before a Spanish-style dinner and a dance. But confusion with the cuisine causes tension

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Portsmouth at the Seacrest Hotel, where owner Antoinette Stretton and general manager Carmen Cretu hope their experience will set them apart

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: On the night shift, paramedics are called to a man complaining of a fast heart rate and chest pains. In the back of the ambulance, he claims to have taken amphetamines for several days. When a man is found slumped over a table outside a shop, the owners ring 999. The patient is intoxicated, and the all-female crew must be wary of his tight grip as they treat him in the back of the ambulance

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors run tests on 89-year-old Alyce, who has been brought to Kings by ambulance after falling near her home. Shes accompanied by her close friend Linda, and reveals her resolve to make sure she lives long enough to celebrate her next birthday. Soon after, 23-year-old groom-to-be Sean is examined following an epileptic seizure lasting most of the night

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Among those arriving at Kings College Hospital is 56-year-old Malcolm, who is put on life support after a cardiac arrest. Nightclub host Phil, 36, receives treatment for chronic pain in his back and side, and realises his party lifestyle is taking its toll, while medics discover 61-year-old Bob has suffered a stroke. Doctors also see to Kamilla, 12, who has been knocked down by a car on a pedestrian crossing

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Tara takes the gang clubbing in one of Barcelonas top nightclubs. Her 24 hours in charge pushes some of the group out of their comfort zone, but will her idea of holiday heaven be someones holiday hell?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Entrepreneur Mark Crib welcomes the group to the Urban Beach in Bournemouth, Dorset, for the weeks final BandB visit. The boutique establishment features chic rooms with deluxe bathrooms, and the guests approve of the afternoons activity - a speedboat ride along the Jurassic coast

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien continue their mission to repurpose old cast-offs into cash, making an extraordinary find from a Dutch designer in accountant Debbies lean-to

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Laura and Nick dream of making a permanent move to Spain with their beloved dog Poppy. Theyre after a property in Estepona on Spains Costa del Sol that meets both their needs and Poppys. Property expert Jean Johansson lines up five options for their £160,000 budget

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Windsor, Berkshire, the first to host is estate agent Vikki whos hoping to bag the £1000 prize by hosting a ladies day-themed dinner party. The guests shes hoping to impress are entrepreneur and self-proclaimed winner Mohinder, local radio DJ Mary, 66-year-old football-loving Angie and second-hand car dealer Robert. With some gamey golfers, difficult diners and cutting commentary, it promises to be a night her guests wont forget in a hurry

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the second night in Windsor, and radio DJ Mary hosts an evening featuring traditional Irish dishes like vegetable soup, steak with champ, and an Eton Mess with a twist

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week in Windsor is outspoken entrepreneur Mohinder, who hopes to impress his fellow guests with an ambitious menu featuring tulips and a cauliflower foam

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Day four in Windsor is hosted by retired sales manager Angie, who is planning some 1960s fun. However, her guests are not impressed by the rules she lays down at the beginning

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the final night of the competition in Windsor, Berkshire, car salesman Rob unleashes the mother of all surprises on his guests, welcoming them to his enormous country mansion complete with swimming pool and Ferrari. Estate agent Vicky and radio DJ Mary are smitten by Rob and his house, but for entrepreneur Mohinder its all too much as hes completely upstaged and realises he is no longer leader of the pack

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at Gracelands Glamping, in Ballyronan, County Londonderry, where couple Shaun Coleman and Hollie Pattison host. In the evening, Derry and Mikes broken TV leaves the pair pining for some entertainment. At breakfast, the DIY instant barbecue gets a grilling by some of the guests, and the hosts find some of their scores hard to digest

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former international rugby union player Brian Robinson welcomes guests to Manse on the Beach in Cloughey, Co Down, where sea views and an onsite sauna prove a hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to The Secret Garden Glamping in Skelmersdale, Lancashire, but guests feel hemmed in by their hideaway and yearn for a communal connection

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Walkeringham in Nottinghamshire, and Hawthorn Hideaway, owned by partners Ronnie and Jo Lee. Theyre hoping that their relaxing, adults-only accommodation will be loved by all. Guests Derry and Mike are delighted by the decor, and Shaun and Hollie are stunned by a surprise, but things dont quite add up for Brian. In the morning, the cook-your-own breakfast is a hit with most, but for Derry and Mike, the facilities failing leads to frustration

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: On the final day, the BandB owners gather to settle some scores. Gracelands Glamping is up first and Shaun and Hollie want to get to the bottom of their disappointing breakfast scores. Meanwhile, Brian wants to pull back the covers on Shaun and Hollies sleep score from Manse on the Beach. Eventually, the payments are revealed and a winner is announced

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head off to Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, to rescue a 1992 VW Corrado, a German coupe that, in its time, was one of the fastest small family cars on the road. The car belongs to 37-year-old Ashley, who even went as far as changing his surname to match his car. Sadly, when Ashley fell ill, his car ended up rotting away under a cover

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim Shaw and Fuzz Townshend head to Rochdale to rescue an Opel Manta GTE. The car belongs to former amateur rally driver Alan, who loved his Manta so much he couldnt bear to part with it, even when it went off the road. With Alan becoming a bit of a recluse after developing health problems and losing his wife to cancer, his family and friends hope that the Car S.O.S treatment will be just the thing to bring Alan back out of his shell

programme.title: Location, Location, Location

Could this explain the mystery of dozens of bodies found sheltering in a warehouse - some laden with treasure, others stripped of all worldly goods?

programme.title: Los Angeles: Stories from the City
programme.desc: Part two of two. Los Angeles, one of the largest cities in the United States and the world, has a unique story. As this documentary reveals, in the space of less than 150 years LA has transformed itself from a little lawless cow town into one of the biggest cities on the planet

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Examining General MacArthurs campaign to liberate the Philippines and his resultant popularity back home in America - which belied the scale of the bloodshed necessary for victory. The documentary also studies the US Armys losses in late autumn 1944, while trying to force its way through the heavily defended Hurtgen Forest and Vosges Mountains, which lie on Germanys eastern border

programme.title: The M Factor: Shredding the Silence on Menopause
programme.desc: Menopause is a silent epidemic that affects the health and wellbeing of millions of women. In addition to experiencing traumatic physical symptoms, women often struggle with related emotional stresses. Despite its universality, menopause remains mired in silence and misinformation, exacerbating the broader crisis in womens health. Symptoms can derail careers, disrupt relationships and cause unnecessary physical suffering. This film confronts this neglected crisis, challenges societal and medical misunderstandings, and advocates for a revolutionary approach to womens health

programme.title: Treasures Decoded
programme.desc: How recent investigations at Pompeii - the Roman city located in southern Italy that was destroyed by the eruption of Mount Vesuvius in 79AD - have revealed a dark underbelly of lawlessness, murder and political intrigue. Could this explain the mystery of dozens of bodies found sheltering in a warehouse - some laden with treasure, others stripped of all worldly goods?

programme.title: The M Factor: Shredding the Silence on Menopause
programme.desc: Menopause is a silent epidemic that affects the health and wellbeing of millions of women. In addition to experiencing traumatic physical symptoms, women often struggle with related emotional stresses. Despite its universality, menopause remains mired in silence and misinformation, exacerbating the broader crisis in womens health. Symptoms can derail careers, disrupt relationships and cause unnecessary physical suffering. This film confronts this neglected crisis, challenges societal and medical misunderstandings, and advocates for a revolutionary approach to womens health

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Examining General MacArthurs campaign to liberate the Philippines and his resultant popularity back home in America - which belied the scale of the bloodshed necessary for victory. The documentary also studies the US Armys losses in late autumn 1944, while trying to force its way through the heavily defended Hurtgen Forest and Vosges Mountains, which lie on Germanys eastern border

programme.title: Los Angeles: Stories from the City
programme.desc: Part two of two. Los Angeles, one of the largest cities in the United States and the world, has a unique story. As this documentary reveals, in the space of less than 150 years LA has transformed itself from a little lawless cow town into one of the biggest cities on the planet

programme.desc: James Braxton and Izzie Balmer hunt for profit-making antiques in Snowdonia. Scent bottles, brick moulds, and cloisonne bowls attract the attention of these antiques aficionados. programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Izzie Balmer hunt for profit-making antiques in south Wales. Jewellery specialist Izzie strikes gold while shopping, finding a bangle, pendant and earrings, and takes a punt on a Wedgwood pie dish. She also dips into the history of Tenby, a seaside town once a Georgian spa resort. Meanwhile, James accumulates a hoard of shiny items and one piece of silver causes a shock at auction. Later, the pair watch on from the impressive Cilwendeg Mansion in Pembrokeshire as the final auction of the trip takes place in Buckinghamshire

programme.desc: A battered ventriloquists dummy is brought back to life so his owner can entertain the grandkids at a birthday party. A typewriter and an athletics trophy are also restored

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Drew and Al buy from businesses in the process of change. They find a striking Windsor chair, an anatomical model, and artefacts from a former mill

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: With her new shop opening, Viki fills the van while on the road with Drew. They snap up French advertising art and a dolls-house cabinet

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon crew members receive devastating news about their mining permits. The Dust Devils gamble big on a huge quartz reef and Shane and Russell strike gold

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A new crew finds itself under threat from crocodiles and accusations of illegal prospecting. The Victoria Diggers season is crippled until they receive some welcome help

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: After an epic tour of the south and south west, Raj Bisram and Paul Martins shopping and sale-room the duo hope to acquire anything going for a sonnet. Their shopping and sale-room extravaganza concludes at a Palladian mansion in the Cotswolds

programme.title: The Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus Ashworth heads to Bradford to look through a vast collection of coins, toys and jewellery. Plus, the team clear Yorkshire-made furniture from a beautiful cottage

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: A battered ventriloquists dummy is brought back to life so his owner can entertain the grandkids at a birthday party. A typewriter and an athletics trophy are also restored

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: In Lancashire, Henry Cole and Sam Lovegrove explore a garage packed with hundreds of treasures and trinkets. They encounter various military vehicles and a lovely old petrol pump

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Bike guru Henry Cole and ace mechanic Sam Lovegrove head across the sea to Northern Ireland, searching for collections theyve never seen before.

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Fuzz visit Rob in Shropshire. They uncover a Matchless G3, tin signs, and a BSA mower in a shed that is Henrys idea of heaven

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: In a shed in Nottinghamshire, Henry and Fuzz find a rugged Ural sidecar. Built for war and wilderness, can they revive it, or will it win the battle?

programme.title: Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Brian Conley enlists Angus to help his singer daughter Lucy raise money for a mixing desk, and Angus visits Edwina Curries home to help raise funds for Ukraine

programme.title: Celebrity Yorkshire Auction House
programme.desc: Angus helps comic Tommy Cannon sell his collection of showbiz memorabilia. Then Vanessa Feltz needs him to free up some space in her incredible north London home

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Izzie Balmer hunt for profit-making antiques in Snowdonia. Scent bottles, brick moulds, and cloisonne bowls attract the attention of these antiques aficionados. James finds time to slip into chainmail to learn about a revolutionary Welsh King, while Izzie befriends an equally iconic and beefy local legend. The duo then head to the latest auction in Leicestershire

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Izzie Balmer hunt for profit-making antiques in south Wales. Jewellery specialist Izzie strikes gold while shopping, finding a bangle, pendant and earrings, and takes a punt on a Wedgwood pie dish. She also dips into the history of Tenby, a seaside town once a Georgian spa resort. Meanwhile, James accumulates a hoard of shiny items and one piece of silver causes a shock at auction. Later, the pair watch on from the impressive Cilwendeg Mansion in Pembrokeshire as the final auction of the trip takes place in Buckinghamshire

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Fuzz Townshend visit Davids Derbyshire shed, a treasure trove of vintage mechanical gems, and uncover a wonderful Monet-Goyon motorbike

programme.title: Shed and Buried
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Fuzz Townshend visit Richards Staffordshire shed, uncovering an Excelsior and Mobylette as they dive into a treasure trove of two-wheeled gems

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Audio expert Mark restores a vintage jukebox that holds fond memories for widower Jeff. Plus, silversmith Brenton navigates his way through an old compass

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Musical expert David attempts to bring a beloved pump organ back to life. Meanwhile, furniture restorer Will works on a handmade crib from World War I

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How plasterboard is made from power station smoke, the casting of the worlds top awards, and how planes are built that can take off and land almost anywhere

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

Grant Williams returns to Derry to spend more time with his daughter Wendy OHagan to make the most of their time together in light of his recent diagnosis of Alzheimers, while Colin Deering - who first met his brother Bryan back in 2014 - starts out on a new journey to find out about his birth father

programme.title: Long Lost Family: What Happened Next

As the showcase nears, Father Brown is shocked at how cut throat the world of competitive dancing is. Gillian dumps her regular dance partner, her brother Derek Fletcham in favour of Italian Stallion Mario Cantoloni, while award-winning couple Pauline Danbury and Robert Danbury find the pressure a strain on their relationship. The very next day, Gillian is found murdered at the dance school. Derek is firmly in the frame, but Father Brown isnt convinced and investigates the dancing rivalries. Fifties-set crime drama, guest starring Kevin Clifton, with Mark Williams

programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capitals love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the citys first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: King Viserys Targaryen hosts a tournament to celebrate the impending birth of his second child, while his daughter Rhaenyra welcomes her Uncle Daemon back to the Red Keep. First episode of the Game of Thrones prequel, starring Paddy Considine and Matt Smith

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra questions Daemons loyalty as Otto schemes to turn the public against her, while Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme, while Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.sub-title: The Red Dragon and the Gold
programme.desc: In Rhaenyras absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In Kings Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegons fragile hold on authority. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming discovers more little-known facts on a journey between Smithfields and Spitalfields, two of Londons most famous markets. He begins with a fry-up breakfast before visiting the remains of a Roman amphitheatre and investigating a mysterious secret in a Liverpool Street hotel, as well as meeting former EastEnders star Larry Lamb (Archie Mitchell)

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores Newcastle, discovering strange sounds by the river and finding out how traditional culture is being reinterpreted in the Byker district. He goes behind the scenes at Newcastle United with local football hero Peter Beardsley, learns about the history of adult comic Viz from former editor Simon Donald and accompanies comedienne Sarah Millican to her favourite part of the city

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: While mourning a tragic loss, Rhaenyra tries desperately to hold the realm together and Daemon prepares for war. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: Carmy and Sydney agree to create a new dinner menu, while Fak reveals that Richie has been selling cocaine in the alley behind the restaurant

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: The restaurant has its windows shot out by stray gunfire and Richie asks the local gangsters to find out who did it, while Natalie and Carmy search for the missing documents

programme.title: The Bear
programme.desc: The restaurant receives a good review from a food critic, while things spiral out of control after the computerised takeaway service generates more orders than they can fill

programme.title: The Bear

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyse the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemons unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape and Rhaenyra looks to press home her advantage. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: The Penningtons, owners of Muncaster Castle in the Lake District, discuss the challenges of housing three generations of their family under one roof, while elderly patriarch Patrick struggles to find new purpose following the death of his wife. At Maunsel House in Somerset, Sir Benjamin Slades preconceptions are challenged when a gay mens choir arrives for a weekend break

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming heads across the Irish Sea to Dublin, where he succumbs to the citys famous charm and meets some of its most fascinating characters. On a journey that takes in an 18th-century pleasure house and a burlesque life-painting class, Alan also stops off in Temple Bar for a pint with singer Sharon Corr, unlocks a mystery in Irelands oldest library and uncovers a stylish secret that lurks behind the steel shutters of an old lock-up

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: After overthrowing her husband and having his successor jailed and eventually murdered, Russian empress Catherine II will stop at nothing to keep her position. She sees her own son as a threat to her and refuses to marry the man who helped her to power for fear he will share the crown. Historical drama following the German-born empress of Russia towards the end of her reign. Starring Helen Mirren and Jason Clarke

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Potemkin returns and hopes to begin a relationship with Catherine, only to discover she has fallen for Lieutenant Vasilchikov. Meanwhile, Prince Paul becomes increasingly frustrated at the perceived refusal of his succession

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Catherine struggles to deal with Potemkins moods and jealousy and tragedy strikes for Paul, forcing her to resort to extreme measures

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: In the final episode, Potemkin is forced to fight for Catherine and for Russia once again, and the exertion of war begins to take its toll on their relationship

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife

programme.title: Succession

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Kendall, Shiv and Roman consider an aggressive move regarding the Matsson deal, Connor tries to make the most of his wedding rehearsal dinner

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Logan doles out an unsavoury task to Roman ahead of his trip to meet Matsson, Connor fixates on small details at his wedding.

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance
